subject: Champa, Universe 6 Destroyer God, gesturing with one hand raised, seated or posed in authority
description: A rotund, purple cat-eared humanoid figure is depicted in a commanding pose, one arm raised with finger pointed or gesturing upward. The figure wears a dark vest-like garment with lighter trims. Behind the figure, purple and lavender energy swirls fill the background. The composition is a mid-shot with a slightly more measured, authoritative feel compared to a purely combat-action pose. The figure's expression reads as smug or scheming. The background palette is purple with soft magenta gradients.
foreground: rotund purple humanoid with cat-like ears, one arm raised gesturing, smug expression
